resources.string: Lesi sifundo esemephu esemqoka ethuthukisiwe, ehlanganisa imiyalo eminingi emisha. Ukuze ukhethe imephu esemqoka, iya kumasethingi eTalkBack > Amasethingi athuthukisiwe > Izinqamuleli zekhibhodi.\n\nCindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze ukhethe isihloko. Ukuze uthole umuzwa ohamba phambili, vula iTalkBack ngaphambi kokuqalisa.
Ukuxhumana okuyisisekelo
Hamba phakathi kwezinto, funda ngemigqa, sebenzisa amamenyu, kanye nokuningi
Imodi yokubhrawuza
Zulazula kukhontenti yewebhu ngokushesha usebenzisa imiyalo yokugxuma
Izilawuli zokufunda
Sebenzisa izilawuli ezifundayo ukuze ugxume phakathi kwezinto, ulungise amasethingi enkulumo kanye nokuningi
Izincazelo zesithombe
Zama ukuthola izincazelo zezithombe
Phrakthiza izinqamuleli zekhibhodi
Cindezela izinkinobho kanye nenhlanganisela yezinkinobho ukuze ufunde ukuthi zenzani

ITalkback ikunikeza impendulo yezwi ukuze ukwazi ukusebenzisa idivayisi yakho ngaphandle kokubheka isikrini. ITalkBack ingaba wusizo kubantu abanobunzima bokubona isikrini. Uma iTalkBack ivuliwe, into okugxilwe kuyo esikrinini iyashiwo ngokuzwakalayo.\n\nOkokuqala ake sijwayelane nekhibhodi yakho. Thola Inkinobho yokufinyelela, engaphezu kwenkinobho ethi Shift engakwesobunxele. Manje asithole izinkinobho zemicibisholo eziseduze nendawo ephansi ngakwesokudla sekhibhodi. Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze uye entweni elandelayo.

Lena into elandelayo. Ukuze uye entweni yangaphambilini, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo ongakwesobunxele.\n\nUma uya entweni esebenzisekayo njengenkinobho, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + ISpace ukuze uyivule. Thola inkinobho elandelayo bese uqhubeka nesifundo.
Funda ngohlamvu, ngegama, noma ngesigaba

Kwesinye isikhathi, ungafuna ukuzwa umbhalo ufundwa ngokuzwakalayo uhlamvu olulodwa ngesikhathi.

Ukuze wenze lokhu, ungasebenzisa ukuzulazula kwezilawuli zokufunda. Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo wangakwesokudla noma wangakwesobunxele uze uzwe okuthi "izinhlamvu."

Okulandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phezulu ukuze uhambise ukugxila kokuzulazula emuva ngohlamvu. Cindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke ophansi ukuze uhambise ukugxila kokuzulazula phambili ngohlamvu.

Kuzame manje. Ungaphinde ukhethe nokufunda ngamagama, ngemigqa, noma ngezigaba usebenzisa Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla noma obheke kwesobunxele.
Ukufuna kwesistimu

Ukuzama lezi zinqamuleli zekhibhodi manje kuzovala lesi sifundo. Ungase ufune ukulinda uze uqede lesi sifundo.

Ukuze ugxume phakathi kwamawindi e-app avuliwe nezakhi zesistimu njengezaziso kanye Nebha yomsebenzi, cindezela Isenzo + Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke phezulu noma phansi.

Ukuze uvule uhlu lwe-app, cindezela Isenzo.

Ukuze uye Esikrinini sasekhaya futhi unciphise wonke amawindi avuliwe, cindezela Isenzo + H noma Ikhaya emgqeni ophezulu.

Ukuze uye kuma-app akho obusanda kuwasebenzisa, cindezela Isenzo + Ithebhu noma okuthi Iqoqa emgqeni ophezulu.

Ukuze ugxume ngokushesha phakathi kwamawindi, cindezela ungadedeli u-Alt bese ucindezela okuthi Ithebhu.

Ukuze ubuyele emuva, cindezela Isenzo + Esc noma okuthi Back emgqeni ophezulu.

Ukuze uvule izaziso, cindezela Isenzo + N.
Lungisa amasethingi enkulumo

Ivolumu yenkulumo yeTalkBack ibizwa ngevolumu yokufinyeleleka. Ilungiswa ngokuhlukile kuvolumu yemidiya.

Ukuze ulungise ivolumu yokufinyeleleka, cindezela Isenzo + Nyusa ivolumu noma yehlisa ivolumu.

Ukuze ulungise izinga lokugijima kwenkulumo, cindezela Isenzo + Ctrl + Nyusa ivolumu ukuze ukhuphule kanye Nesenzo + Ctrl + Yehlisa ivolumu ukuze wehlise.

Ukuze umise inkulumo noma nini, cindezela u-Ctrl.
Imenyu yeTalkBack nezinqamuleli zekhibhodi ezengeziwe

Imenyu yeTalkBack ihlanganisa amasethingi nezilawuli ongase uzidinge njalo.

Ukuze uvule imenyu yeTalkBack, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Ctrl + M. Ungaqamba ngokwabahlinzekelwayo imenyu yeTalkBack nezilawuli zakho zokufunda kamuva kumasethingi eTalkBack.

Imenyu yezinqamuleli zekhibhodi yeTalkBack ihlanganisa zonke izinqamuleli zekhibhodi ongazisebenzisa.

Ukuze uvule imenyu yezinqamuleli zekhibhodi, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + /.

Ukuze ufunde kabanzi mayelana nekhibhodi futhi uzijwayelanise nezinqamuleli zekhibhodi, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + 0 ukuze uvule isikrini sokuphrakthiza.
Konke kusethiwe!

Usukulungele ukusebenzisa iTalkBack.

Qhubeka nokufunda ngezinye izihloko manje, noma ubuyekeze lolu lwazi noma nini kumasethingi eTalkBack.

Ukuze uvule noma uvale iTalkBack noma nini, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Alt + T.
Funa ikhontenti yewebhu ngokushesha ngemodi yokubhrawuza

Lapho ukubhrawuza nakuma-app ewebhu, ungavula imodi yokubhrawuza bese ugxuma phakathi kwezinhlobo ezihlukahlukene zokufunda ze-granularity nezilawuli ngokucindezela inkinobho kanye. Kwenza ukufuna ekhasini kufane nokufuna ebhokisini lokuhlela umbhalo, njengokusebenzisa imicibisholo engakwesobunxele nangakwesokudla ukuze uhambe ngohlamvu kanye nokusebenzisa imicibisholo ebheke phezulu naphansi ukuze uhambe ngomugqa.

Ukuze uvule noma uvale imodi yokubhrawuza, cindezela kabili Inkinobho yokufinyelela.

Uma imodi yokubhrawuza ivuliwe, cindezela u-D ukuze weqele endaweni elandelayo, u-F ukuze uthole isilawuli esilandelayo noma inkambu yefomu, u-B ukuze uthole inkinobho elandelayo, u-K ukuze uthole ilinki elandelayo kanye no-H ukuze uthole isihloko esilandelayo. Cindezela bese ubamba uShift bese ucindezela lezi zinkinobho ukuze uye emuva.

Ungaphinde usebenzise Imicibisholo eya phezulu neya phansi ukuze weqe ngemigqa, Iicibisholo eya kwesobunxele neya kwesokudla ukuze weqe ngezinhlamvu, kanye no-Ctrl + imicibisholo eya kwesobunxele neya kwesokudla ukuze weqe ngamagama.

Cindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo oya kwesokudla ukuze ufake indawo yokuphrakthiza. Ngenkathi ukumalinki endawo yokuphrakthiza, izinkambu zefomu, nezinkinobho ngeke kwenze lutho.
Amazinga esihloko

Amawebhusayithi nama-app ewebhu avame ukusebenzisa izihlokwana ezinamazinga ahlukene ukuze ahlele ikhontenti. Uma imodi yokubhrawuza ivuliwe, cindezela u-1 kuya ku-6 ukuze ugxumele emazingeni esihlokwana. Cindezela bese ubamba uShift bese ucindezela lezi zinkinobho ukuze uyeemuva.\n\nCindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo ongakwesokudla ukuze ufake indawo yokuphrakthiza.
Amathebula

Imodi yokubhrawuza iphinde yenze ukufuna kuthebula kube lula. Uma imodi yokubhrawuza ivuliwe, cindezela u-Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke phezulu kanye nobheke phansi ukuze weqe phakathi kwemigqa kanye no-Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokunxele kanye nobheke kwesokudla ukuze weqe phakathi kwamakholomu.\n\nCindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze ufake indawo yokuphrakthiza.
Ukulungisa umbhalo

Uma ufaka isikhala sombhalo, imodi yokubhrawuza izovalwa okwesikhashana ukuze ukwazi ukusebenzisa zonke izinkinobho ukuze uthayiphe. Uzozwa isimemezelo nomsindo uma ivaliwe. Lapho usuka esikhaleni sombhalo, imodi yokubhrawuza izovuleka futhi uzozwa esinye isimemezelo nomsindo.\n\nCindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze ufake indawo yokuphrakthiza.
Okwengeziwe mayelana nemodi yokubhrawuza
Ukuze uhlole uhlu oluphelele lwezinto ongagxuma phakathi kwazo kumodi yokubhrawuza, cindezela Isenzo + Shift + / bese usesha \"imodi yokubhrawuza\" kumenyu yezinqamuleli zekhibhodi.
Funda ngohlamvu, ngegama, noma ngesigaba

Kwesinye isikhathi, ungafuna ukuzwa umbhalo ufundwa ngokuzwakalayo uhlamvu olulodwa ngesikhathi.

Ukuze wenze lokhu, ungasebenzisa ukuzulazula kwezilawuli zokufunda. Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla noma obheke kwesobunxele uze uzwe "izinhlamvu." Okulandelayo, cindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phezulu ukuze uhlehlise ukugxila kokuzulazula kuye emuva ngohlamvu. Cindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke ophansi ukuze uhambise ukugxila kokuzulazula phambili ngohlamvu.

Kuzame manje. Ungaphinda ukhethe ukufunda ngamagama, ngemigqa noma ngezigaba usebenzisa Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla noma obheke kwesobunxele.
Yeqa phakathi kwezilawuli

Izilawuli izinto ongasebenzisana nazo, njengezinkinobho, amabhokisi okuhlola, namabhokisi ombhalo.

Kwamanye amakhasi, ungase ufune ukweqa phakathi kwezilawuli ukuze uthole ngokushesha isenzo, njengenkinobho elandelayo.

Ukuze wenze lokhu, cindezela Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla uze uzwe "izilawuli." Okulandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phezulu ukuze uye enkinobheni yangaphambilini kanye nokuthi Action + Umcibisholo obheke phansi ukuze uye enkinobheni elandelayo.

Kuzame manje futhi uthole inkinobho elandelayo.
Yeqa phakathi kwamalinki

Ungaphinda weqe phakathi kwamalinki asekhasini.

Ukuze wenze lokhu, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla uze uzwe okuthi "amalinki." Okulandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phansi ukuze uthole ilinki eqanjwe ngokuthi "Ilinki 5." Ngenkathi usesifundweni, ukuthepha kabili le linki ngeke kwenze lutho.

Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze uthole inkinobho elandelayo bese uya ekhasini elilandelayo.
Yeqa phakathi kwezihloko

Ungaphinda weqe phakathi kwezihloko ezisekhasini.\n\nUkuze ukuzame manje, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla uze uzwe okuthi \"izihloko.\" Okulandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phansi ukuze uthole isihloko esithi \"Ukuzulazula\".
Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze uthole inkinobho elandelayo.
Yeqa phakathi kweziqukathi

Ukuze uphume esiqukathini, njengohlu noma igridi, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla noma obheke kwesokunxele. Lokhu kuyasiza uma ufuna ukuphuma ohlwini olude lwezinto.\n\nUkuze ukuzame manje, cindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze ufake uhlu. Bese ucindezela okuthi Isenzo + Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze uye esiqukathini esilandelayo.
Ukuze uye esiqukathini esilandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla
Ukuze uphume kulesi siqukathi, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Alt + Ctrl + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla

Uphumile esiqukathini. Ungakwazi futhi ukwengeza iziqukathi ezilawulini zakho zokufunda bese ucindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla noma obheke kwesobunxele ukuze ukhethe iziqukathi kanye nokuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke phansi noma obheke phezulu ukuze ugxume phakathi kweziqukathi. Ukuze ubuyekeze izilawuli zokufunda, iya kuTalkBack > Amasethingi > Wenze ngendlela oyithandayo amamenyu > Zenze ngendlela oyithandayo izilawuli zokufunda.\n\nCindezela Isenzo + Umcibisholo obheke kwesokudla ukuze uthole inkinobho elandelayo.
Zenze ngendlela oyithandayo izilawuli zokufunda

Ungaphinda ulungise amasethingi enkulumo usebenzisa izilawuli zokufunda futhi wenze ngendlela oyithandayo ongakwenza ngezilawuli zokufunda kuTalkBack > Amasethingi > Wenze ngendlela oyithandayo amamenyu > Zenze ngendlela oyithandayo izilawuli zokufunda.
Zama ukuthola izincazelo zesithombe
Uma ugxile esithombeni, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + R, bese ucindezela okuthi I. Kunesithombe esisodwa ngezansi. Zama ukuthola incazelo yaso.
Ungashintsha amasethingi encazelo yesithombe noma nini emasethingini eTalkBack > Izincazelo zesithombe nesithonjana.
Ungashintsha amasethingi encazelo yesithombe noma nini emasethingini eTalkBack bese ushintsha Izincazelo zesithombe nesithonjana.
Isampula yesithombe. Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + R, bese ucindezela okuthi I ukuze uzwe incazelo.
Imiyalo yezwi

Ungasebenzisa izwi lakho ukulawula iTalkBack ngokushesha.

Ngokwesibonelo, yisho umyalo wokushintsha ukuzula, weqele esihlokweni esilandelayo, kopisha umbhalo nokuningi.

Ukuze uzame manje, cindezela Isenzo + \.
Ukusebenzisa ukusesha kwesikrini

Isakhi sokusesha isikrini sikuvumela ukuthi ubheke ikhontenti yokuthile esikrinini.

Ukuze ukuzame, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + CTRL + /. Thayipha igama elisemqoka, njengelithi "okulandelayo," ukuze uthole izinto ezinalowo mbhalo esikrinini.

Zama ukusesha okuthi "okulandelayo" manje ukuze uthole inkinobho elandelayo.
Funa ngokusesha kwesikrini

Ungahamba ngokushesha phakathi kwemiphumela yosesho ehlukene ekuseshini kwesikrini ngemva kokukhetha umphumela.

Ukwenza lokhu, ungasebenzisa ukuzulazula kwezilawuli zokufunda. Cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Shift + Umcibisholo obheke ngakwesokudla noma ngakwesobunxele kuze kube yilapho uzwa okuthi "ukusesha kwesikrini." Okulandelayo, cindezela okuthi Isenzo + Umcibisholo Oya Phansi noma Oya Phezulu ukuze ufune ngemiphumela yokusesha kwesikrini.

Masikuzame manje. Ngezansi kunohlu lwezinkinobho ezi-3, zonke ziqukethe umbhalo othi"isenzo." Sesha "isenzo" usebenzisa ukusesha kwesikrini, bese ufuna ngokusesha kwesikrini ukuze uhambe phakathi kwawo.
Phrakthiza izinqamuleli zekhibhodi
Cindezela ukhiye wekhibhodi ophathekayo noma inhlanganisela yokhiye ukuze uzwe ukuthi yenzani. Cindezela u-Ctrl + W, noma u-Escape ukuze uphume.

Zitholele Ubukhosi BamaRedwood ase-California

Amaredwood ase-California, ngokuyinhloko ama-redwood asogwini (Sequoia sempervrens), yizihlahla ezinde kunazo zonke emhlabeni. Amanye amile ngaphezu kwamamitha angu-115 futhi angaphila izinkulungwane zeminyaka. Zichuma esimweni sezulu esinomswakama sasezindaweni ezisogwini olusenyakatho yeCalifornia, zizuza emvuleni nenkungu.

Ungazibona Kanjani

Uzothola lezi zinhlobo ezinkulu emgqeni omncane osogwini lwePacific. Amapaki ayinhloko ahlanganisa:

  • Redwood National and State Parks
  • Humboldt Redwoods State Park
  • Big Basin Redwoods State Park

Hlela ukuvakasha kwakho lapha: California State Parks - redwoods

Sekela Ukulondolozwa

Ukuvikela lawa mahlathi asendulo kubalulekile. Ungasiza ngokulandela izinkombandlela zepaki futhi usekele imizamo yokulondoloza.

Yabelana Ngolwazi Lwakho

Wake waya kumaredwood?

Sitshele ngolwazi lwakho

Yini enye ongathanda ukuyifunda ngamaredwood?

Izihlahla zeRedwood: Ukugcina Indawo Yethu Inempilo

AmaRedwood abalulekile eplanethini yethu, adlala indima enkulu ekugcineni indawo yethu inempilo.

Izihlanzi Zomoya Ezinkulu

Lezi zihlahla ziyamangalisa ekumunceni i-carbon dioxide emoyeni. Ngokungenisa okuningi kakhulu, amaredwood asiza ukugcina umoya wethu uhlanzekile.

Ikhaya Lezilwane

Amaredwood ahlinzeka ngamakhaya nezindawo zokukhosela zezilwane eziningi, kusukela ezinyonini emagatsheni azo kuya ezidalweni ezincane emhlabathini.

Osomathuba Bamanzi

Bakahle kakhulu ekubambeni inkungu, bese iyaconsa phansi ehlathini. Lokhu kugcina umhlabathi unomswakama futhi kunikeza amanzi kwezinye izitshalo nezilwane, ikakhulukazi uma komile.

Izivikeli Zomhlabathi

Izimpande zazo eziqinile zibamba umhlabathi, ziwuvimbele ukuba ukhukhuleke phakathi nezimvula ezinamandla futhi zivimbele ukuguguleka.

Abakhi Bamahlathi

Uma amaredwood amadala ewa, ukhuni wawo uba ukudla nendawo yokukhosela yezitshalo nezidalwa ezintsha, kusungulwa umhlabathi ocebile wokukhula okusha.

Ama-Ecosystem Ayingqayizivele

Ngenxa yokuthi ama-redwood makhulu kangaka futhi aphila isikhathi eside kangaka, asungula izindawo zamahlathi ezikhethekile ezisekela impilo engatholakali kwenye indawo.

Izilwane Zamahlathi ERedwood

Isilwane Incazelo Lapho Zihlala Khona Iqiniso Elimnandi
Banana Slug I-slug enkulu, ephuzi, enobulimbu Phansi ehlathini I-slug yesibili ngobukhulu emhlabeni
Pacific Giant Salamander I-salamander enkulu, enombala omnyama Eduze kwemifula nezindawo ezinomswakama Ingakhula ibe ngamamitha angaba ngamashumi amathathu ubude
Roosevelt Elk Inyamazane enkulu enezimpondo ezinhle Idla ezindaweni ezivulekile ehlathini Abesilisa bangaba nesisindo esingaphezu kwamakhilogremu angama-450
Northern Spotted Owl Isikhova esimaphakathi, sizela ebusuku Emahlathini aminyene, avuthiwe e-redwood \"Uhlobo lwesikhombi\" – impilo yaso ibonisa impilo yehlathi
Black Bear Isilwane esikhulu, ngokuvamile esimnyama noma esinsundu Sifuna ukudla kulo lonke ihlathi Singabagibeli abahle kakhulu, sivame ukubonwa ezihlahleni

Imicabango yakho ngamaRedwood nemvelo

Yini enye ongathanda ukuyifunda ngamaRedwood?

Iyiphi indawo oyintandokazi emvelweni ongathanda ukuyivakashela?

Yimuphi umqondo owodwa emvelweni ofuna ukufunda kabanzi ngawo?
